detail: De-anonymized the accepted icl-diversity workshop paper on `main` (4 local commits, byte-identity to the accepted PDF verified, only author/venue metadata changed), built and verified a flat arXiv tarball via arxiv-collector (`arxiv-build/`, 28pp, 0 undefined refs, no NeurIPS/anon strings), and created the reusable `/camera-ready-paper` skill. Remaining are two user actions: fill the Acknowledgements stub (then I regenerate the tarball) and upload to arXiv per `SUBMIT_CHECKLIST.md`; nothing pushed.

output.result: De-anonymized the accepted icl-diversity workshop paper on `main` (4 local commits, byte-identity to the accepted PDF verified, only author/venue metadata changed), built and verified a flat arXiv tarball via arxiv-collector (`arxiv-build/`, 28pp, 0 undefined refs, no NeurIPS/anon strings), and created the reusable `/camera-ready-paper` skill. intent:
It is time to make the icl-diversity project camera-ready! It was accepted to the Human-AI Co-Creativity @ ICML 2026! The workshop said a week ago that they would share further instructions about camera-ready papers soon, but I want to post the paper on arxiv so I can share it. Please start by doing research on what needs to be done.
Some sources to start you off:
- https://icml.cc/Conferences/2026/AuthorInstructions#camera-ready
- https://genaicreativity.org/icml2026/
- Please find more sources to figure out what we need to do.
Some extra considerations:
- I also submitted to NeurIPS. I don't expect to be accepted, but I would like to avoid doing things that would get me desk-rejected. Please have a subagent find information on the policies we must follow. If I have to choose between ICML Workshop and Neurips, I'll choose ICML workshop (bird in the hand)
- I will be doing a couple of follow-up experiments that were asked for by reviewers. What is the proper way to listen to reviewers, since it is essentially adding unreviewed information to the paper? Is there a proper way to clearly flag it?
- I would like to turn this into a ~/.claude skill "/camera-ready-paper".
name: arxiv paper submission
